text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Ever since our previous defeat, we have trained
tirelessly for this day.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I have fully applied myself and followed your
guidance to the letter. It is safe to say that we've
done everything in our power.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Therefore the time for words is behind us. Now we
need only show the world the fruits of our labors!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That previous loss will be our last. Henceforth,
the Emperor's road shall be paved with victory!
